g.text: 4x NEMA 17 Steppers | Yaw, Pitch, Roll, Belt
GND Bus Bar (250A, 5/16" stud) | PSU GND -> 14 AWG -> bus bar | 18 AWG to perfboard GND
4x TMC2209 Drivers (pin headers) | UART addressed | 2A RMS each
Screw Terminals (in) | 10 positions: 4x VMOT+GND + 1x bus bar V+/GND
18 AWG each (ring terminals to bus bar)
